title: Refactor gauntlet.py into gauntlet/ package + Quota Burn Fixes

phases_completed.notes: Initial plan drafted with 5 Quota Burn fixes + 4 user adjustments
Codex 5.4 pre-gauntlet critique: 14 findings (6 HIGH, 5 MEDIUM, 3 LOW), all addressed
Codex 5.4 + Gemini R1: 10 findings. Key additions: Step 8.5 (debate.py flags), __main__.py, checkpoint envelope schema, timeout policy, error contract
Codex 5.4 + Gemini R2: 12 findings. Key additions: exact API signature, GauntletExecutionError, flag precedence, --show-manifest, 10 required pytest tests, exit 130
9 adversaries, 75 raw -> 42 clustered -> 23 accepted. Key catch: --resume flag collision (G-1 CRITICAL). 9 findings fixed in spec.
All 18 Trello cards completed (AS-0 through AS-18). Package refactor, tests, docs, and follow-up tasks all done.

hotfixes_applied.description: Fixed 4 hardcoded timeouts (Phase 2: 120->timeout, Phase 3: 60->timeout, Phase 3.5: 60->timeout, Final Boss: 600->max(timeout,600))
hotfixes_applied.reason: Needed for gauntlet to run correctly during plan development

decision_journal.reason: debate.py already has --resume SESSION_ID for session resumption — flag collision caught by prior_art_scout adversary
paranoid_security adversary flagged unpinned dependency as supply chain risk

decision_journal.decision: Add checkpoint after Phase 3.5 clustering (not just Phase 4 and 7)
decision_journal.reason: burned_oncall adversary identified in-memory clustered data as highest-cost crash failure mode
pedantic_nitpicker adversary noted policy-only enforcement is insufficient — need runtime guard
